title: doxomma sumatranum
intro: Doxomma sumatranum, also known as the Sumatran doxomma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. This plant is native to Sumatra, Indonesia, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Doxomma sumatranum are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, promoting relaxation, and boosting the immune system.
